meaning: n.轻度经济衰退,股票市场震动
examples: Most clearly, the lightly regulated hedge fund industry described by Mr. Luo as the Galapagos of financial services is suffering a shakeout.
Winners and Losers from a Standards shakeout.
The “dangling arm shakeout” is the technique universally used to foster pump recovery.
Others said that the market may now be set for a quieter period after the shakeout.
Database software had its shakeout in 1990, and is now worth a trillion dollars as well.
